We Get Around Network (WGAN) is the world's leading online community for virtual tour professionals, 3D scanning specialists, and real estate media entrepreneurs
— with 9,500+ members across 150 countries actively sharing knowledge, evaluating technology, and building better capture businesses.
Founded in 2014 by Dan Smigrod, WGAN was acquired by Real Estate Media entrepreneur, and now Publisher and Managing Editor Tom Sparks.
Since its founding, WGAN has grown into the most trusted peer resource in the immersive capture industry. Whether you're a Matterport Service Provider (MSP)
running residential shoots, a LiDAR and SLAM scanning specialist working commercial or AEC projects, or a real estate photographer expanding into 3D virtual tours
— WGAN is where professionals in your field come to stay sharp.
What Is We Get Around Network?
We Get Around Network is an online community forum and media platform purpose-built for the capture industry. Unlike general photography groups or real estate forums,
WGAN focuses exclusively on the professionals who create immersive media: the operators behind the cameras, scanners, and drones that are reshaping how spaces are documented,
marketed, and experienced.
WGAN members discuss platforms like Matterport, Giraffe360, Cupix, Pix4D, EyeSpy360, and more, alongside hardware including LiDAR cameras, SLAM scanners, 360° cameras,
and drones. The conversation is peer-to-peer, technically literate, and always grounded in real-world workflows.
Who Is WGAN For?
WGAN serves working capture professionals, including:
Matterport Service Providers (MSPs)
managing residential and commercial scan workflows
3D scanning and LiDAR specialists
working in AEC, scan-to-BIM, and facilities management
Real estate photographers
adding virtual tours, aerial imaging, and 3D floor plans to their service menus
Drone and aerial operators
serving real estate, construction, and inspection clients
Photogrammetry and point cloud professionals
using tools like Pix4D and RealityCapture
Virtual tour platform resellers and independent operators
across 150 countries
If you create immersive media for a living — or want to — you belong here.
What Does WGAN Cover?
With 105,000+ forum posts and new content published daily, WGAN covers the full landscape of the capture industry:
Platform news and reviews
— Matterport, Giraffe360, Cupix, Leica BLK, Ricoh Theta, Insta360, and more
Hardware evaluations
— LiDAR scanners, SLAM devices, 360° cameras, drones, and accessories
Workflow and technique
— processin
